---
title: Stroke
subtitle: Contributing to John Williams' model of the hyperacute/acute stroke pathway
image: royaltyfree.jpg
---

This is a model developed by **John Williams**, a Stroke Performance Analyst at Maidstone and Tunbridge Wells NHS Trust. Additional tweaks, documentation and web app creation have been undertaken by **Sammi Rosser**. I have made some supporting contributions (since **January 2026**).

GitHub: <https://github.com/hsma-tools/stroke_model_des_hsma/tree/main>

Web app:

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://hsma-tools.github.io/stroke_model_des_hsma/"
  title="Stroke model">
</iframe>
